'''Mann Ozzel''' was a merchant who lived many years prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They orchestrated the trading of several varieties of [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], earning their family a considerable amount of wealth. They were the ancestor of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]].<ref name="Fact File" />
